Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

Young Red Dragon attacks Orc — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Orc — Bardic Musician HP: 51/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Orc — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Orc — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Orc — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Orc — Bardic Musician HP: 19/67
→ Orc — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
